channel.title: jetli/awesome-yew Daily Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Oct 12th, 2022
item.description:
Projects

  • note-to-yewstars2 - Convert your markups into Yew macro online, which is also made by Yew.
  • yew-d3-examplestars15 - Showing a d3 chart with Yew.
  • zzhackstars174 - A personal blog, based on Rust & Yew, Live Demo.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Oct 11th, 2022
item.description:
Crates

Utils

  • Yew-Templatestars13 - A crate for separating HTML and Rust code when using Yew.

    • Projects

  • tchatche.rsstars76 - A Websocket chat based application built in Yew and Axum.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Oct 9th, 2022
item.description:
Courses

  • full-stack-todo-rust-coursestars34 - Full stack rust course including course for Yew.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Sep 30th, 2022
item.description:
Projects

  • Portfolio websitestars5 - A portfolio SPA with accessibility built-in by Spencer Imbleau.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Sep 28th, 2022
item.description:
Crates

Javascript Library Ports

  • Plotly.rsstars617 - Rust bindings for the popular Plotly charting library.
  • ag-grid-rsstars3 - Rust bindings for the AG Grid datatable library.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Sep 21st, 2022
item.description:
Articles

  • How to use Rust Yew
  • How to use a modal in Rust
  • How to use routers in Rust Frontend
  • How to modulize your Rust Frontend
  • How to use NPM packages with Rust Frontend
  • How to use markdown with Rust Frontend
  • Fullstack Rust with Yew
  • How to write Full Stack Rust code
  • How to render a YouTube vlog with Rust Yew fetch API
  • How to render blog posts with Rust Yew mounted API

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Sep 11th, 2022
item.description:
Projects

  • surferstars38 - A blog built on yew + graphql, with live demo site. Backend for graphql services, and frontend for web application.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Aug 31st, 2022
item.description:
Projects

  • Kiomet - An online real-time strategy game in which you expand your territory by capturing towers.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Aug 29th, 2022
item.description:
Crates

Component Libraries

  • Yewprintstars330 - Port of blueprintjs.com to Yew.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Jul 25th, 2022
item.description:
Crates

Hooks

  • Bouncestars59 - The uncomplicated state management library for Yew, inspired by Reduxstars58.7k and Recoilstars17.8k.

item.description:
Official

  • Playground - Online playground for Yew.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Jul 18th, 2022
item.description:
Templates

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Jul 12th, 2022
item.description:
Projects

  • Rust Audiostars23 - Realtime audio processing / synthesis using Rust/WASM in the browser, Live Demo.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Jul 11th, 2022
item.description:
Projects

  • CubeShufflestars11 - Card game shuffling utility built with Rust, Yew, Bulma and Tauri.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Jun 23rd, 2022
item.description:
Projects

  • mb2 - A poker server with a Yew client. Click the Demo button and then Start to see the client.
  • Puzzle Cubestars3 - Rubix Cube solver using Rust and Yew, Live Demo.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Jun 9th, 2022
item.description:

Components

  • yew-scroll-areastars0 - Custom scroll area for Yew.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew May 22nd, 2022
item.description:

Components

  • yew-oauth2stars10 - A plain Yew OAuth2/OpenIDConnect component, not tied to any CSS framework.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew May 14th, 2022
item.description:
Projects

  • blog-rsstars31 - A blog system in which frontend and backend are ALL written in Rust. Backend powered by Warp and frontend built on Yew (WASM).

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew May 8th, 2022
item.description:
Projects

  • We-Come Monorepostars1 - This is a monorepo for wecome KM ITB, Live Demo.

item.description:

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Apr 10th, 2022
item.description:

    Utils

  • yew_iconsstars10 - Easily include a variety of svg icons(Feather/Font Awesome/Octicons) into your Yew app.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Apr 7th, 2022
item.description:
Crates

Hooks

  • yewvstars5 - A lightning fast state management module for Yew built with performance and simplicity as a first priority.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Mar 23rd, 2022
item.description:
Templates

  • yew-template-for-github-iostars16 - Directly deployable Template of yew project for github.io, using tailwind and webpack for css, trunk for build and serve.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Mar 19th, 2022
item.description:
Projects

  • PixelGuesserstars3 - PixelGuesser is a real life party gam where players try to guess the contents of an image as quickly as possible.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Mar 17th, 2022
item.description:
Projects

  • yew-ssr-tidestars1 - The example demonstrates Yew server-side rendering with tide & surf, it needs the development version of Yew.
  • yew-ssr-actix-webstars4 - The example demonstrates Yew server-side rendering with actix-web & reqwest, it needs the development version of Yew.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Mar 14th, 2022
item.description:
Projects

  • Rquotestars2 - Rquote is a web application built using Rust and WebAssembly. It fetches Anime quotes from the Animechan API. Live Demo.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Mar 10th, 2022
item.description:
Crates

Utils

  • yew-style-in-rsstars16 - Scoped CSS in Rust for Yew.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Mar 6th, 2022
item.description:
Projects

  • Realworld examplestars577 - Exemplary real world app built with Rust + Yew + WebAssembly. It utilizes Yew's latest function components and hooks. It also supports desktop application powered by Tauristars52.2k.

    • Crates

    Utils

  • Tailwind RSstars48 - Tailwind style tracer in rust, JIT + AOT interpreter.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Mar 1st, 2022
item.description:
Crates

Component Libraries

  • yew-chartstars35 - A Yew-based charting library that provides SVG based components for rendering charts.

    • Articles

  • A code walkthrough video of Yew with a real-world app with Christopher Hunt and Kiki Carter

    • Projects

  • Marc Portfolio - A software developer portfolio, Live Demo.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Feb 27th, 2022
item.description:
Alternatives

  • Dioxusstars5k - Elegant React-like library for building user interfaces for desktop, web, mobile, SSR, liveview, and more.
  • Sycamorestars1.4k - A reactive library for creating web apps in Rust and WebAssembly.

    • Projects

  • Rust algorithmsstars20 - A website with interactive implementations of various algorithms (only sorting algorithms for now).

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Feb 6th, 2022

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Dec 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Crates

Components

  • yew-component-sizestars3 - A Yew component that emits events when the parent component changes width/height.
  • yew-virtual-scrollerstars4 - A Yew component for virtual scrolling / scroll windowing.

    • Projects

  • wasm-2048stars140 - 2048 game implemented with Rust and Yew and compiled to Wasm.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Dec 11th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

  • rust-async-wasm-demostars34 - Toy project to learn Rust and async that can be deployed to the web.

    • Crates

    Component Libraries

  • muicss-yewstars25 - MUI-CSS Components for Yew framework.
  • yew-bulmastars15 - A Rust library providing components based on the bulma css library for projects using Yew.
  • ybcstars185 - A Yew component library based on the Bulma CSS framework.
  • patternfly-yewstars65 - Patternfly components for Yew.

    • Crates

    Components

  • Yew Formstars77 - Components to simplify handling forms with Yew.

    • Crates

    Utils

  • reacty_yewstars43 - Generate Yew components from React components via Typescript type definitions.
  • styled-yewstars25 - CSS in Rust, similar to styled-components, but for Yew.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Oct 28th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

  • dotdotyewstars3 - Dot-voting using Yew, with Rust powering the backend API.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Mar 13th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Mar 9th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

  • caniuse.rsstars138 - Rust feature search.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Mar 8th, 2020

Projects

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Feb 27th, 2020
item.description:
Projects

  • I Love Hue! (rs)stars12 - A clone of the mobile game I Love Hue in Yew (Rust).

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Feb 14th, 2020
item.description:
Related lists

  • Awesome WebAssemblystars7.2k - Collection of awesome things regarding WebAssembly ecosystem.
  • Awesome Rust and WebAssemblystars512 - A list of awesome Rust and WebAssembly projects, libraries, tools, and resources.
  • Awesome Ruststars29.2k - A curated list of Rust code and resources.

    • Alternatives

  • Dracostars297 - A Rust library for building client side web applications with WebAssembly.
  • Sauronstars1.7k - Sauron is an HTML web framework for building web-apps.

    • Official

  • Yewstars24.4k - Rust / WebAssembly framework for building client web apps.

    • Projects

  • web-view todomvc desktop appstars97 - Demo how to use yew for a todomvc that compiles to WebAssembly and is bundled as a lightweight(~2mb) desktop app by web-viewstars1.8k, as an alternative to Electron, web-viewstars1.8k also has a demo.
  • Kirkstars33 - Just A Rust WebAssembly Blog.

    • Crates

    Wasm

  • wasm-bindgenstars5.7k - Facilitating high-level interactions between WebAssembly modules and JavaScript.

    • Tooling

  • wasm-packstars4.6k - Your favorite Rust -> WebAssembly workflow tool.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Feb 9th, 2020
item.description:
Templates

  • Create Yew Appstars130 - Set up a modern Yew web app by running one command, npx create-yew-app my-app.

    • Books

  • The wasm-pack Guide - How to build and work with rust-generated WebAssembly.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Feb 1st, 2020
item.description:
Projects

  • karaoke-rsstars135 - A simple, network enabled karaoke player in Rust.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Jan 21st, 2020
item.description:
Official

  • API Docs - Docs on docs.rs.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Jan 18th, 2020
item.description:
Official

  • Financial Contribute - Become a financial contributor and help us sustain our community.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Jan 14th, 2020
item.description:
Books

  • Programming WebAssembly with Rust - Includes a chapter Advanced JavaScript Integration with Yew on creating an app with Yew.

    • Projects

  • Rust-Full-Stackstars1.2k - Easily testable and working Rust codes with blog posts to explain them.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Dec 31st, 2019
item.description:
Books

  • The wasm-bindgen Guide - How to bind Rust and JavaScript APIs.
  • The WebAssembly Book - Working with the web and producing .wasm files.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Dec 30th, 2019
item.description:
Alternatives

  • Percystars2.1k - A modular toolkit for building isomorphic web apps with Rust + WebAssembly.
  • Seedstars3.4k - A Rust framework for creating web apps.
  • Smithystars335 - A framework for building WebAssembly apps in Rust.

    • Tooling

  • wabtstars4.8k - The WebAssembly Binary Toolkit, for the wasm-strip and wasm-objdump tools to reduce .wasm file size.
  • binaryenstars6k - Compiler infrastructure and toolchain library for WebAssembly, for the wasm-opt tool to reduce .wasm file size.
  • cargo-webstars1.1k - A Cargo subcommand for the client-side Web.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Dec 29th, 2019
item.description:
Crates

Wasm

  • stdwebstars3.3k - Provides Rust bindings to the Web APIs and to allow a high degree of interoperability between Rust and JavaScript.

    • Projects

  • yew-react-examplestars49 - This project shows how to create a web app using a React component inside a Yew component.

item.title: jetli/awesome-yew Dec 17th, 2019
item.description:
Projects

  • Bucket Questionsstars5 - A webapp written entirely in Rust for a dumb party game.
  • webapp.rsstars2k - A web application completely written in Rust, frontend is built with Yew.

    • Templates

  • yew-parcel-templatestars111 - Awesome Yew with Yew-Router and Parcel application.
  • yew-wasm-pack-templatestars116 - A template for starting a Yew project to be used with wasm-pack.
  • yew-wasm-pack-minimalstars106 - A minimal template for starting a Yew project using wasm-bindgen and wasm-pack.

    • Articles

  • A Web Application completely in Rust
  • Let's Build a Rust Frontend with Yew

    • Official

  • Examples - Smaller examples included in official repo.
  • Website - Official website.
  • Live demo - A todomvc demo.
